text:
おっつかれさまー！
やっぱりここは落ち着くね！

今回も良い訓練ができて良かったよ。
まだまだ行ける場所もあるだろうしね。
また誘うから、一緒にやろうねー！

Hey, fantastic work! Isn't it great to get back
here and put your feet up?

I'm glad we got such a good training run in.
There's no shortage of places left to go,
after all.
Let's do this again soon! I'll give you a shout!
